title: VetCase Tracker: new dog+cat app icon + patient card demographic tweaks

requirements.summary: Add generated dog+cat cartoon icon assets and wire them as the browser/app icons (favicon).
acceptanceCriteria: New icon image files exist under frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filenames specified in imageRequirements.required.
frontend/index.html references the new icon(s) so the browser tab/favicon updates accordingly.
After redeploy, the browser favicon reflects the new dog+cat cartoon head icon.

file_operations.description: Add the required generated static asset for the dog+cat cartoon app icon (512x512, transparent background).
Add the required generated static asset for the dog+cat cartoon app icon (192x192, transparent background).
Add the required generated static asset for the dog+cat cartoon app icon (32x32, transparent background).

Reference the new icon assets for browser/app icons (e.g., favicon) using the generated files at frontend/public/assets/generated/app-icon-dog-cat.dim_32x32.png and, where appropriate, frontend/public/assets/generated/app-icon-dog-cat.dim_192x192.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/app-icon-dog-cat.dim_512x512.png.

requirements.summary: Move the Arrival date display into the case card header (top-right) and remove it from the demographics grid.
acceptanceCriteria: In frontend/src/components/cases/CaseCard.tsx, the Arrival date no longer appears in the demographics grid section.
The Arrival date is visible at the top-right of the card header area (aligned to the right within the header region) for each case card.
The Arrival date remains formatted consistently with the existing date formatting (MM/DD/YYYY).

file_operations.description: Update the card header layout so the existing formatted arrival date is rendered in the header’s top-right area, and remove the current Arrival row from the demographics grid while preserving the existing MM/DD/YYYY formatting.

requirements.summary: Add a computed Age field (years + months) to the case card demographics based on stored Date of Birth.
acceptanceCriteria: If a valid DOB exists, the patient card shows an "Age:" row/value in the demographics section with a human-readable value like "2y 3m" (years and months).
If DOB is missing/invalid, the Age field is not shown (or shows a clear placeholder such as an empty string) and no runtime errors occur.
Age calculation uses the current date and does not display negative values (future DOBs should result in a safe non-negative display or suppressed field).

file_operations.description: Add a date-of-birth age calculation helper that accepts a YYYY-MM-DD DOB string, validates it, computes a non-negative age in years and months relative to the current date, and returns a display-friendly string (or null/empty when invalid or future-dated).

Use the new DOB age helper to conditionally render an "Age:" row in the demographics section when DOB is valid and yields a non-negative age (e.g., "2y 3m"), and suppress the field cleanly when DOB is missing/invalid/future.
